hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE 'rm\s+-rf|>\s*/dev/sd|mkfs\.|dd\s+if=|:()\s*\{.*:|fork\s+bomb|git\s+push\s+.*(-f|--force)|git\s+reset\s+--hard|git\s+clean\s+-[fdx]|chmod\s+777|chown\s+-R|curl.*\|\s*(ba)?sh|wget.*\|\s*(ba)?sh'; then echo '{"systemMessage":"🚫 危险命令已拦截","continue":false,"stopReason":"命令包含潜在危险操作，已阻止执行。"}'; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r fp; case "$fp" in /etc/*|/boot/*|/sys/*|/proc/*|/Windows/*|"$HOME"/.ssh/*|"$HOME"/.gnupg/*) echo '{"systemMessage":"⚠️ 正在写入敏感路径","hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"目标路径为系统敏感目录"}}';; esac; }

jq -r '.tool_input.url' | { read -r url; if echo "$url" | grep -qiE 'localhost|127\.0\.0\.1|192\.168\.|10\.\d+|172\.(1[6-9]|2[0-9]|3[01])\.'; then echo '{"systemMessage":"🚫 阻止内部网络请求","continue":false,"stopReason":"检测到访问内部地址，已阻止"}'; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r fp; if echo "$fp" | grep -qiE '\.env$|\.env\.|credential|secret|private.*key|id_rsa|id_ed25519|\.pem$|\.key$|token'; then echo '{"systemMessage":"⚠️ 已写入敏感文件: 请勿将密钥/凭证提交到版本控制"}'; fi; }

jq -r '.prompt' | { read -r prompt; if echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '(api[_-]?key|secret[_-]?key|access[_-]?token|private[_-]?key|password)[=: ]+[a-zA-Z0-9_\-]{16,}'; then echo '{"systemMessage":"⚠️ 您的消息可能包含凭据信息，请勿在对话中分享密钥！"}'; fi; }
